chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 502 of 2024 Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 Petitioner Abdul Sattar Hisbani present in person Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with Qurban Ali, DSP (Legal) on behalf of DIG Police, Shaheed Benazirabad and Inspector Mir Hashmat Ali on behalf of SSP, Naushahro Feroze O R D E R Learned Assistant Advocate General has filed a statement / comments on behalf of Respondent No.4, which are taken on record. A copy of the same has been provided to the Petitioner, who is present in person before the Court. Through this Constitutional Petition, the petitioner has prayed as under;- (a) to direct the respondents No.2 and 4 consider the application of the petitioner for his appointment as Junior Clerk as observed by this Court at Principal Seat in C.P No.D-3197 of 2013 (b) to direct the Respondent No.2 and 4 to consider the application of the petitioner for appointment as Junior Clerk following with compliance of order dated 13.12.2016 passed by this Court in C.P No.D-3197 of 2013, as petitioner has already enhanced his skills to be entitled for appointment as Junior Clerk. (c) Any other relief that this Honourable Court may deem fit and proper in the circumstances of the case. Since the Constitutional Petition No.D-3197 of 2013 has been decided at Principal Seat, and if such order has not been complied-with by the Respondents, the Petitioner was / is to approach the same Court by filing Contempt Application or application for implementation of order/judgment. No fresh petition for implementation of the same judgment is maintainable before this Court, which is hereby dismissed.

Since the Constitutional Petition No.D-3197 of 2013 has been decided at Principal Seat, and if such order has not been complied-with by the Respondents, the Petitioner was / is to approach the same Court by filing Contempt Application or application for implementation of order/judgment. No fresh petition for implementation of the same judgment is maintainable before this Court, which is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
